# Chapter 9 Player ID Locales

Use the Player ID Locales feature to maintain country and state codes beyond the default list
provided within Machine Accounting.


## 9.1 Adding Player ID Locales

To add a player ID locale:

1\. Select IGT Spade > Configuration > Player ID Locales. The ID Locales window
opens.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/155.2.png)




2\. Click Country or State. All the countries or states and their abbreviations appear.

3\. Click Add. The Add Country or Add State window opens.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="155" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 9 Player ID Locales" -->




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/156.1.png)




4\. Enter the name of the new country or state in the Name field.

5\. Enter the abbreviation for the new country or state in the Abbrev. field.

6\. Click OK. The Add Country/State window closes, and the ID Locales window updates.

7\. After adding all desired player ID locales, click Done. The ID Locales window closes.


## 9.2 Deleting Player ID Locales

To delete a player ID locale:

1\. Select IGT Spade > Configuration > Player ID Locales. The ID Locales window
opens.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/156.2.png)




2\. Click Country or State. All the countries or states and their abbreviations appear.

3\. Select the abbreviation to delete, then click Delete. A confirmation message appears.

4\. Click Yes. The confirmation message closes, and the ID Locales window updates.

5\. After deleting all desired player ID locales, click Done. The ID Locales window closes.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="156" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/157.1.png)
